subcodes.first_line: O thou who art receiving grace from the Abhá Kingdom! Though the bounty of the April rain upon meadow and plain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستفیض از فیض ملکوت ابهی فیض سحاب نیسانی اگر چه دشت و چمن
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @effort; striving, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
